caption: In a large indoor ballroom with recessed ceiling lighting and a blue dance floor, several couples are engaged in ballroom dancing. In the foreground, a man wearing a black sleeveless top and white trousers dances with a woman in a white long-sleeved top and white trousers; they move closer together and shift their positions, with the man leading the woman through a turn. In the background, another couple is visible, consisting of a man in a black t-shirt and blue jeans dancing with a woman in a white outfit. A seated audience fills the background, watching the performance from tables lined with white cloths. As the sequence progresses, the foreground couple transitions from a hold into a dynamic movement where the man supports the woman. The lighting is warm, and the overall scene depicts a formal dance event.
